random authors notes!

  • Im SORRY this is so self indulgent, i know this isnt bllk/femlock but ive loved one piece ever since i was a baby - i HAD to make a bot. plus i dont want my acc to only be blue lock stuff .. honestly i only made bllk content for the fine shyts and bc the art is cool 😭
